backend/main.mo: Defines the actor's persistent state and numerous data maps plus diagnostic, study, and content types, along with an ID generator and blob‑storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries describing required frontend files, components, tests, and confidence levels for multiple new study‑module features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides prewritten summaries of many frontend files for reference, describing their behaviors and roles in the application.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point that loads the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component handling authentication, profile initialization, onboarding flow, and routing to dashboard or landing page.
frontend/src/components/community/HelpAI: Help chat UI that manages a session, sends user messages, and generates simulated AI responses based on input topics.
frontend/src/components/community/Troubl: Troubleshooting chat that creates diagnostic sessions, handles messages and measurements, and generates guided AI responses.
frontend/src/components/community/VideoL: Displays searchable, category‑filtered video resources with cards showing details, durations, and external links.
Interactive flip‑card viewer allowing users to browse, flip, and reset flashcards.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying copyright text and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GuestBanner.tsx: Banner shown to guest users with upgrade option and dismiss button, optionally opening the profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component handling authentication state, theme toggling, mobile menu, and user dropdown with profile and logout options.
frontend/src/components/OnboardingWalkth: Modal walkthrough that cycles through onboarding screens and lets users skip or complete the introduction.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Profile setup modal collecting user details and submitting onboarding info, with success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/QuizViewer.tsx: Quiz interface allowing answer selection, navigation, scoring, and detailed result review.
frontend/src/components/study/Achievemen: Computes achievement statuses from progress data and renders badges with progress, requirements, and earned states.
frontend/src/components/study/AnalyticsV: Visualizes learning metrics using charts for module scores, EPA performance, progress timelines, and skill strengths.
frontend/src/components/study/CoreLesson: Displays core HVAC lessons with selectable modules and a viewer, adjusting guidance based on study mode.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Cont: Shows EPA 608 study sections with filtered videos, tabs, and playlist/video link buttons based on user section selection.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Exam: Implements a timed EPA 608 exam simulator with randomized questions, answer tracking, navigation, scoring, and optional explanations.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Less: Renders a lesson module with theory, videos, scenarios, and interactive practice including explanation flow for beginners.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Modu: Provides the main EPA 608 study hub with cert selection and tabs for study content, practice, tools, exams, and readiness tracking.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Prac: Delivers adaptive practice quizzes with difficulty adjustment, performance scoring, explanations, and result reporting.
frontend/src/components/study/EPA608Read: Displays readiness metrics, mastery levels, weak areas, and recommendations across EPA 608 certification sections.
frontend/src/components/study/HandsOnExe: Provides an interactive list of HVAC calculation exercises and renders detailed input-based practice modules for each selected exercise.
frontend/src/components/study/Interactiv: Displays a hub of virtual HVAC diagnostic tools and loads the corresponding simulator when a tool is selected.
frontend/src/components/study/LessonView: Renders lesson content with tabs for theory, diagrams, and formulas, including zoomable images and beginner tips.
frontend/src/components/study/Multimeter: Shows a structured multimeter training guide covering continuity testing, safety rules, examples, and common mistakes.
frontend/src/components/study/ProgressDa: Displays user learning progress with module completion stats, streaks, quiz performance, and achievement dashboards.
frontend/src/components/study/RecoveryTr: Provides interactive HVAC recovery, pump-down, and vacuum procedure checklists with progress tracking and diagram selection.
frontend/src/components/study/StudySyste: Displays the main HVAC study system homepage with navigation cards, hero section, and beginner/expert mode indicator.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Airf: Simulates duct airflow, CFM, and velocity to evaluate system performance and provide feedback for different HVAC system types.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Digi: Simulates multimeter readings for various HVAC components, evaluating voltage, amperage, and resistance with feedback and safety warnings.
Interactive pressure gauge simulator with refrigerant-specific ranges, status evaluation, and feedback messages.
Temperature input tool that calculates superheat and subcooling with status indicators and beginner guidance.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Leak: Leak detection simulator with adjustable sensitivity, scan behavior, severity evaluation, and repair recommendations.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/PPES: PPE selection simulator for different HVAC scenarios, comparing selected items to required safety equipment.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Supe: Superheat and subcooling calculator using PT charts, target calculations, status assessment, and diagnostic output.
frontend/src/components/study/tools/Virt: Interactive refrigerant recovery simulator with safety checks, pressure calculations, and progress tracking based on selected refrigerant data.
frontend/src/components/study/UEiDL589Mu: Presents a detailed instructional guide for using the UEi DL589 multimeter with HVAC-focused measurement rules and examples.
frontend/src/data/epaQuestionBank.ts: Large EPA 608 exam question bank defining questions, answers, metadata, and regulatory references for multiple sections.
frontend/src/data/refrigerantDatabase.ts: Comprehensive refrigerant specification list containing technical properties, classifications, and application notes.
frontend/src/data/videoLibrary.ts: Curated list of HVAC-related YouTube videos with metadata, categories, and linked lesson topics.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity provider and hook managing authentication, identity loading, login, logout, and related status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profiles with automatic initialization and validation logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining theme variables, dark mode styles, utilities, and accessibility improvements.
frontend/src/lib/diagnosticFlows.ts: Provides TypeScript interfaces and predefined diagnostic flow steps for HVAC troubleshooting logic.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point initializing React, QueryClient, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Implements the main dashboard UI with tab navigation and lazy‑loaded feature modules.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page enabling login or guest access with hero content and feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/CalculatorsTab.t: Provides a tabbed interface for HVAC calculators and includes a superheat calculator with simple input-driven calculations.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/CommunityTab.tsx: Renders community resources with navigation to AI help, troubleshooting chat, video library, and knowledge base.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/DataLoggingTab.t: Allows users to log, validate, view, and export HVAC measurement data with dialog-based entry creation.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/JobsTab.tsx: Supports creating and managing HVAC job records with a modal form using backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/PartsTab.tsx: Implements a searchable HVAC parts database with filtering, detailed part info, and integrated resources.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/PhotoDiagnosticT: UI for capturing or uploading photos, showing a camera dialog, and running a simulated AI analysis with results display.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/StudyTab.tsx: Controls navigation between study modules, loading user profile and mapping study mode to local types.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/SuppliersTab.tsx: Displays supplier listings with categories, filtering, dialogs for managing custom suppliers, and preloaded Orlando-area data.
frontend/src/pages/tabs/TroubleshooterTa: Implements a complex diagnostic workflow with modes, session data, AI recommendations, and multi‑step troubleshooting UI.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines local frontend types for profiles, suppliers, videos, jobs, diagnostics, and messages mirroring backend structures.
frontend/src/types/study.ts: Defines the local StudyMode union type and helpers for beginner and expert modes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters for routing and state retention.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, animations, and container settings, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing study module requirements, architecture notes, and existing feature definitions for educational content modules.
